topPrompts.prompt: Full body standing pose of Black woman with short cropped hair in the steel blue scoop-neck crop top and matching high-waist leggings, warm amber key light from camera-left painting her right side gold and catching the ribbed texture of the fabric, cool steel blue gel from camera-right filling the shadow side and blending into the garment color, dark charcoal seamless studio background, one hand resting on hip, confident direct eye contact, shot at 35mm f/2.8 low angle looking slightly up, dark polished concrete floor reflecting warm light, high-fashion editorial

Black woman with short cropped hair in steel blue crop top and high-waist leggings standing three-quarter angle facing camera-right, one hand on hip showing the crop top silhouette and legging fit, hard amber spotlight from directly camera-left creating a sharp warm line down her right arm and leg with the left side falling into cool blue shadow, dark seamless studio background, 85mm f/2 shallow focus isolating her against the void, the steel blue fabric saturated and rich under the directional light, fashion test shoot editorial

Black woman with short cropped hair in steel blue crop top and leggings sitting on a dark polished concrete studio floor, one knee drawn up with her arm resting on it, other leg extended, relaxed confident pose, warm amber toplight from above-left creating rich shadows beneath her jawline and across the leggings, cool blue ambient bouncing off the dark floor, the steel blue set glowing against the charcoal ground, shot at 50mm f/2 from floor level, editorial magazine energy

Waist-to-knee crop of Black woman in the steel blue high-waist leggings, one hand adjusting the high waistband, dramatic side light from camera-right raking across the seamless ribbed fabric showing the body-contouring fit and texture, dark skin creating beautiful contrast against the saturated steel blue, dark moody studio background, shot at macro distance 100mm f/2.8, the blue rich and dimensional under the hard directional light, intimate product detail
